children.text: A pre-authorisation is a temporary hold that is placed on a specific amount of the available balance on a credit or debit card. A pre-authorisation is not a charge to your card and no funds have been debited from your account.

data.question: What is credit/debit card pre-authorisation?
data.name: What is credit/debit card pre-authorisation?

children.text: The amount that will be pre-authorised on your credit/debit card will be the maximum amount you selected to purchase at the pump.

data.question: How much will the credit/debit card pre-authorisation be?
data.name: How much will the credit/debit card pre-authorisation be?

children.text: Pre-authorisation is a requirement that is mandated by Visa and MasterCard on both Maxol, as the merchant, and your bank, as the card issuer. The rules governing pre-authorisation are set by Visa and MasterCard. While Maxol currently complies with all of their requirements, we are aware of a small number of banks that have not yet completed the necessary system changes needed to comply with Visa and MasterCard’s latest requirements.

data.question: Who is responsible for pre-authorisation?
data.name: Who is responsible for pre-authorisation?

children.text: For the majority of customers, the pre-authorisation will be released almost immediately following the transaction. However, we are aware that customers of certain banks are experiencing delays in seeing the pre-authorised amount being released on their cards.

These currently include customers of Bank of Ireland and Permanent TSB who can experience delays of up to 10 working days to have the pre-authorisation released. Both banks have assured us that they are working on a solution to this issue and it should be available to customers in the near future.

data.question: When will the pre-authorisation be released from my credit/debit card?
data.name: When will the pre-authorisation be released from my credit/debit card?

children.text: You can select to receive a receipt during your Pay At Pump transaction. If you did not do this, or have mislaid your receipt, you can print a copy receipt at the pay terminal. Simply return to the same pay terminal and select the ‘Ticket’ option on screen and insert the debit/credit card used. A copy receipt will be issued automatically.
Alternatively, you can send your transaction details to
customerservice@Maxol.com
and a copy receipt will be issued to you.

data.question: I was not issued a receipt for my Pay At Pump transaction?
data.name: I was not issued a receipt for my Pay At Pump transaction?

children.text: Current banking procedures do not allow certain cards, including prepaid cards, to be used at automated fuel dispensers. Please contact your bank who will be able to confirm if this caused your card to be declined.

children.text: The Maxol Loyalty App is our new app that is packed with benefits and rewards for customers. The app includes great offers in-store along with digital loyalty cards for ROSA Coffee and Car Wash. Plus, this is the only app in Ireland that offers FuelPay, the easier way to pay for fuel.
Key Benefits:
- FuelPay
- Engine Oil Advisor
- Great Offers and Rewards
- ROSA Coffee - buy 5 get 1 free
- Car wash
- Buy 4 get 1 free
- Free birthday treat
- Free coffee when you sign-up
- Station Finder

data.question: What is the Maxol Loyalty App?
data.name: What is the Maxol Loyalty App?

children.text: Yes, the app is designed for both iOS and Android phones. Just go to your app store and download.

data.question: Can I download the App to any phone?
data.name: Can I download the App to any phone?

children.text: Yes, download the Maxol Loyalty app to your phone and follow the registration steps to enter your details.

data.question: Do I need to register to use the App?
data.name: Do I need to register to use the App?

children.text: The only information required initially is your mobile number. Please ensure you drop the 0 at the start of your mobile number when entering it.

data.question: What details are required to register?
data.name: What details are required to register?

children.text: Please ensure you drop the 0 at the start of your mobile number when entering it.

data.question: Why have I received an invalid mobile number message when registering?
data.name: Why have I received an invalid mobile number message when registering?

children.text: If you don’t receive the verification code, you can request in app to resend the code and it will be sent to your phone.

data.question: I never received my verification code?
data.name: I never received my verification code?

children.text: A gold star is awarded when you spend €5 in-store* and €30 or more on fuel**  *The following categories are excluded, agency, cigarettes, lottery, baby products and alcohol. **One gold star is awarded per fuel transaction of €30 or more. Multiple gold stars are not awarded on fuel purchases.

data.question: How do I earn stars?

children.text: To become a gold member, simply earn 10 gold stars in 90 days.

data.question: How do I become a gold member?

children.text: To check the number of gold stars earned, simply visit the home page in the app. The number of stars earned out of 10 is displayed on the top right hand corner.

data.name: How can I check my gold stars

children.text: For being a Maxol Loyalty member, you will benefit from special offers on specific products every month.

children.text: For being a Maxol Loyalty member, you will receive rewards such as a Free ROSA Coffee on signup, a birthday treat. Other rewards include a free ROSA coffee when you buy 6 and a free car wash when you buy 4. All you need to do to receive rewards is scan the app in-store when making any purchases and relevant rewards will be sent to the app for future use.

children.text: A digital stamp is earned every time you purchase any ROSA Coffee & scan your digital loyalty card at the till. When you purchase 5 coffees, you will receive a rewards voucher for the 6th coffee free. You can check the number of stamps collected by clicking on ROSA Coffee Loyalty on the home page of the app.

data.question: How do I earn coffee loyalty stamps?
data.name: How do I earn coffee loyalty stamps?

children.text: A digital stamp is earned every time you purchase any car wash & scan your digital loyalty card at the till. When you purchase 4 car washes, you will receive a rewards voucher for the 5th wash free. The free car wash is the Ultimate top wash. You can check the number of stamps collected by clicking on Car Wash Loyalty on the home page of the app.

data.question: How do I earn car wash loyalty stamps?

children.text: No, the Maxol app is the main communication tool for the loyalty programme and all stamps will be visible in the app. You no longer will need a printed loyalty card.

data.question: My loyalty stamp has not been applied - what do I do?
data.name: My loyalty stamp has not been applied - what do I do?

children.text: In order to use a coupon or a voucher that you have in your app, you must activate it before you get to the till for scanning. You will find an activation button at the bottom of each coupon or voucher.

data.question: How do I activate my rewards & offers?
data.name: How do I activate my rewards & offers?

children.text: It is important to check the expiry date on any coupons or vouchers issued to ensure it is used within the validity period. If a coupon or voucher has disappeared from the app it has then expired and cannot be viewed or reissued.

data.question: My coupon or voucher has disappeared in the App - where can I view it?
data.name: My coupon or voucher has disappeared in the App - where can I view it?

children.text: FuelPay is a quick and convenient way to pay for fuel while in the App in your car. Fuel Pay instructions can be found in the app by clicking on the fuelpay icon on the home page.
Instructions:
1. Ensure Location Services is turned on.
2. Confirm you are at the correct Maxol Service Station.
3. Please enter the 4-digit code which you will see at the pump e.g. 0101.
4. Please choose the fuel type and press confirm.
5. Please choose the amount you want to spend and press confirm e.g. €20.
6. Please choose your payment method and press confirm - credit/debit card.
7. Please enter car payment details and press confirm.
8. Your Purchase has been successful and you receipt in available on My Page - Receipts in the "More" section in the menu at the bottom of the App.
9. The pump will be released and you are ready to fill up.
Please do not use your mobile phone on the forecourt while the pump is in operation.

data.question: How does FuelPay work?
data.name: How does FuelPay work?

children.text: For FuelPay to work, access to location must be allowed while using the App.
Android 5.0, iOS 11.0 are the minimum versions needed where the geolocation location works.

data.question: Why is FuelPay not working on my phone?
data.name: Why is FuelPay not working on my phone?

children.text: Once you have used FuelPay once and entered your payment card details, you can then go to the MyPage section and update your details there. All payment information is hashed and encrypted through our payment provider.

data.question: Are my payment details stored in the app?
data.name: Are my payment details stored in the app?

children.text: You can find all digital receipts in the receipts section under My Page - Receipts in the "More" section in the menu at the bottom of the app. You don't need to do anything, we'll instantly save these for you after every shop.

data.question: Where will I find my digital receipts?

children.text: You can make changes to your personal details by clicking edit on the top right hand corner in the My Page section of the app. This can be found by clicking on the "More" section in the menu at the bottom of the screen.

data.question: How can I change my personal details?

children.text: When using FuelPay in the Maxol Loyalty App, you will be asked to select an amount before you fill up your vehicle. We will seek a pre-authorisation for the amount selected from your bank. When you finish filling up, we will request the exact sales amount only from your bank and the immediate release of the initial pre-authorisation. In most instances the release of the pre-authorisation is instant however depending on your bank it can take up to 10 working days.
Please contact your bank to resolve directly and be assured we will only charge for the fuel purchased.

data.question: Why is there a pre-authorisation on my account?
data.name: Why is there a pre-authorisation on my account?

children.text: You can opt out under the Preference section in My Page which can be found in the "More" section in the menu at the bottom of the app.
